name: Material Design 3
description: Role = color family. Variations = M3 token slots. Figma folders mirror M3's hierarchy. Contrast calibrated per slot use case.

name: Atlassian Design System
description: Property-first token hierarchy matching color.background.brand.bold and --ds-* CSS variables. Collection names match ADS: 'color-palette' + 'color'.

name: Radix UI
description: Radix's 12-step semantic scale. Role = purpose layer (background, element, border, solid, text). Variation = named slot within that layer. Matches Radix Themes and shadcn/ui token namespace.

roles.name: background
roles.description: Page background fills · app canvas and subtle tint

roles.name: element
roles.description: UI element fills · resting · hover · active

roles.name: border
roles.description: Borders and separators · subtle divider · UI border · hover border

roles.name: solid
roles.description: Solid fills · button/badge backgrounds · resting and hover

roles.name: text
roles.description: Text contrast tiers · low-contrast muted · high-contrast body

roles.name: overlay
roles.description: Overlay scrim · modal and drawer backdrop

name: Apple HIG
description: iOS/macOS adaptive semantic colors. Role = Apple color family (label, fill, background, separator). Variation = tier (primary → quaternary). Fixed system color primitives in a separate collection.

roles.name: label
roles.description: Text label hierarchy · primary → secondary → tertiary → quaternary

roles.name: fill
roles.description: System fill hierarchy · interactive control surfaces · 4 tiers

roles.description: System background · page / grouped / nested surface

roles.description: Grouped-style (insetGrouped) background hierarchy

roles.name: separator
roles.description: Separator lines · translucent hairline and opaque fallback

roles.description: Interactive tint · primary accent in four rendering tiers

roles.description: Error / destructive semantic hierarchy · 4 rendering tiers

roles.name: status/success
roles.description: Success / confirmation semantic hierarchy · 4 rendering tiers

roles.name: status/warning
roles.description: Warning / attention semantic hierarchy · 4 rendering tiers

name: Tailwind CSS
description: Tailwind's 11-stop palette with a semantic layer on top. Role = use case (background, border, fill, text, status). Variation = intensity/state within that role. Collection names match Tailwind conventions.

roles.description: Background fills · subtle tint · surface · raised card

roles.description: Warning feedback · tinted bg · border · text

roles.description: Error feedback · tinted bg · border · text

name: IBM Carbon
description: IBM Carbon enterprise token architecture. Role = semantic layer group. Variation = named slot within that group. All four Carbon themes (White, Gray-10, Gray-90, Gray-100) with full Interactive/Layer/Text/Field/Border/Support coverage.

name: Shopify Polaris
description: Shopify Polaris commerce token architecture. Role = semantic group (background, surface, text, border, icon, action, status). Variation = named slot. Brand/Info/Success/Caution/Critical/Magic channels with full interaction state coverage.

colors.description: Polaris magic purple — AI / Shopify Intelligence
